title: Near-Term Quantum Counting and Sampling
description: Explore near-term approaches to quantum counting and amplitude estimation, including approximate amplitude estimation, variational quantum counting, and applications to Monte Carlo methods.
learningObjectives: Understand the limitations of standard QPE-based amplitude estimation on NISQ devices
Implement approximate amplitude estimation algorithms suitable for near-term hardware
Apply quantum-enhanced Monte Carlo methods for financial and scientific applications
Analyze trade-offs between circuit depth and estimation accuracy
